title: PG–Notion Integrity Final Report

status_mismatch.note: All 4 remaining are PG→Notion status mapping aliases (monitoring→In Progress, in-progress→In Progress, folded→Done, Grooming→Backlog). Pages are correctly set.

duplicate_pages.note: All duplicates archived. 3 runs required due to old pages reactivating during create-missing operations.

missing_in_notion.note: All 9 are false positives. PG has colon-extended IDs (e.g., 'TKT-0337: P1-A Context Budget Guards...') while the audit extracts short IDs from Notion titles. Both point to the same Notion page.

notion_orphans.note: Same colon-extended ID false positive as missing_in_notion.

chg_in_backlog.note: All 162 CHG records archived from Backlog DB. changelog-append.sh fixed to write to Archive DB (CHG-0401 3-DB architecture).

root_causes_fixed: pg-to-notion-sync.sh: db-write.sh degraded → now uses direct db.sh -c UPDATE (notionpageid write-back works)
changelog-append.sh: hardcoded Backlog DB ID → now writes to Archive DB C
Duplicate creation: no dedup logic → now handled by notion-dedup-sync.sh
Stale notionpageid: old pages archived but PG still references them → cleared 67 stale refs + recreated fresh pages
Shared-page collisions: 2 collisions (TKT-0229/0230/0252/0253/0254 overlapping) → fixed, unique pages per TKT
scripts_created: scripts/notion-create-missing.sh — bulk create Notion pages for PG-only tickets
scripts/notion-orphan-cleanup.sh — archive Notion pages without PG counterparts
known_false_positives: Colon-extended PG IDs (TKT-0337: description) — audit uses short ID matching
Status mapping aliases — pg-to-notion-status-sync.sh maps correctly but audit doesn't know equivalence
Orphaned CHG records — audit queries Backlog DB only; CHG records now in Archive DB
verdict: PG AND NOTION ARE INTEGRITY-INTACT. All 306 initial gaps resolved. Remaining 15 audit detections are all false positives from colon-extended PG ticket IDs and status mapping aliases — no real data mismatch exists.
